title: Package, CLI, API, Configuration, Async Lifecycle, and Deployment · Program Brief: Cli Api Contract
summary: The agent is one script with import-time clients, embedded keys, no health distinction, inconsistent CLI and API behavior, mutable model defaults, and no graceful shutdown. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cli api contract increment in installable operable Python agent service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Expose consistent request, event, terminal, error, cancellation, idempotency, and version behavior through accessible CLI and authenticated API surfaces.
Separate domain policy, provider adapter, orchestration, tools, persistence, interfaces, and composition root in an import-safe typed package.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-cli-api-contract — Expose consistent request, event, terminal, error, cancellation, idempotency, and version behavior through accessible CLI and authenticated API surfaces.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-package-api-deployment-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-package-api-deployment-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_package_api_deployment_4(target_environments: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, lifecycle_smokes: int = 12, healthy_shutdowns: int = 12, leaked_credentials: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if target_environments < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_environments:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if lifecycle_smokes < 3 or healthy_shutdowns != lifecycle_smokes:
        return False, healthy_shutdowns, "lifecycle-gap"
    if leaked_credentials > 0:
        return False, leaked_credentials, "deployment-secret-leak"
    assert clean_installs == target_environments and healthy_shutdowns == lifecycle_smokes
    return True, healthy_shutdowns, "operable-agent-service"

steps.instruction:

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-cli-api-contract-1vc8ue
# Competency: agentpy-cli-api-contract.
# Case 4039: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_cli_api_contract_1vc8ue(target_environments: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, lifecycle_smokes: int = 12, healthy_shutdowns: int = 12, leaked_credentials: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1vc8ue = "1vc8ue-eu8cv1-4039"
    assert evidence_variant_1vc8ue
    evidence_axes_1vc8ue = (
        "authority1vc8ue",
        "interaction4039",
        "tooleu8cv1",
        "state1vc8ue4039",
        "evaluation40391vc8ue",
        "recoveryeu8cv14039",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1vc8ue)) == 6
    if target_environments < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_environments:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if lifecycle_smokes < 3 or healthy_shutdowns != lifecycle_smokes:
        return False, healthy_shutdowns, "lifecycle-gap"
    if leaked_credentials > 0:
        return False, leaked_credentials, "deployment-secret-leak"
    assert clean_installs == target_environments and healthy_shutdowns == lifecycle_smokes
    return True, healthy_shutdowns, "operable-agent-service"
